0.q: After the addition of ouabain and amiloride (a SOS1 inhibitor), Na+ efflux was significantly restricted; NhSOS1 encoding the Na+/H+ antiporter.

1.q: Both the transcript level of NhNKA2 and enzyme activity of Na+/K+-ATPase increased in the early response of N. haitanensis thalli to hypersaline stress... important role of Na+/K+-ATPase in maintaining K+/Na+ homeostasis.
